content.en:
"Ancient demon-level ruins?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, didn't he say that the existence of the ancient demon level would not fall, but would only be sealed, how could there still be an ancient demon-level ruins?

So, he asked directly: "Patriarch, the ancient demon level will not fall, why are there still ancient demon level relics?"

Crane Shadow introduced: "God, I never said that the ancient demon level would not fall, but in the current era of the Aby of Arrow, the existence of the ancient demon level will not be killed, but will only be sealed. But a long time ago, a big war broke out between the ancient demon levels, and many ancient demon level existences fell, which led to a rapid decrease in the number of ancient demon level existences in the Abyss of Aromu. That's why there is such an agreement. "

"That's right!"

Ye Tian understood, this ancient demon-level relic was a relic from a long time ago.

Immediately, Ye Tian inquired about the situation of this ancient demon-level relic.

And Crane Shadow introduced: "The former owner of this ancient demon-level relic was the ancient demon fox B, the strength of this ancient demon is said to be not weak, but unfortunately it fell, and the ruins he left contain a lot of opportunities, but it will only open once in a long time, and countless strong people want to obtain the inheritance and treasures he left behind, but no one has done it yet." And the emperor level can't enter his ruins, and the ancient demon level is not allowed to enter, if he forcibly enters, the entire ruins will be destroyed, and even the means of severely damaging the ancient demon level will explode. "

"Of course, this ancient demon-level ruin is also dangerous, but the danger is not bad, as long as you don't die, it's still not ~ easy to fall. "

After that, Crane Shadow passed a lot of information to Ye Tian, all of which were information about this ancient demon-level relic.

"Patriarch, I'm willing to go in!"

Ye Tian said.

After all, the inheritance of the Eagle Department is too ordinary, although it is very helpful to him, but if he obtains the inheritance of the ancient demon level, the benefits will be even greater.

Therefore, he had to enter this ancient demon-level relic to obtain more benefits and thus quickly improve his strength.

And he knew that in addition to Ye Tian and Patriarch Heying, there was also an elder who was going to these three places.

After that, he waited in the clan for the ancient demon-level ruin to open.

Time passed slowly, and a period of time passed.

this day.

Patriarch Crane Shadow informed Ye Tian that the ancient demon-level ruins were about to be opened, and they could trigger it.

Swish!!!

They set out from the Eagle Department and kept shuttling, and it took a long time before they arrived at their destination, the Ten Realms Fox Mountain.

This used to be the territory of the ancient demon of Huyi, but now it has become a place of ruins, and there are many terrifying killing arrays here.

After coming here, Tsurukage was very low-key, not daring to perceive the surroundings and not daring to talk nonsense.

After all, there are many strong people here, and many very terrifying king-level are far beyond him, and there are even emperor-level escorts to the king-level over.

There is only one emperor-level ancestor in the Eagle Ministry, and it is impossible to send them over if they need to guard the Eagle Ministry.

If you offend these strong people, it will not be a good thing for the Eagle Department.

That's when it happened.

A terrifying Emperor-level creature tore through the Ultimate Void, a creature similar to a Kunpeng.

"It's the Cataclysmic Golden Peng, with an ancient demon-level bloodline!"

"It should be that the powerhouses of the Golden God Department have arrived, it is said that the Golden God Department has raised a six-headed emperor-level natural disaster Jinpeng, and now I finally see it!"

"What a terrible natural calamity, Jin Peng's strength is probably the top combat power among the emperor level!"

A group of kings discussed.

And Ye Tian also looked at the natural disaster Jinpeng, estimating the strength of the other party.

"It's even more terrifying than some of the Ultimate Ultimate Realm Lords, and just in terms of physical bodies, the physical bodies of those Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords in the Ultimate Land are far inferior to this Heavenly Calamity Golden Peng, which at least has one-tenth of the physical strength of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It can be said that only if he has not broken through the Ultimate Extreme Venerable before he can defeat this natural calamity Jinpeng, but it is definitely not very easy.

You must know that before he broke through the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, he also created a relatively high-level Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao, and he had improved to the limit in all aspects, but he was only a little more powerful than this natural disaster-level Jinpeng.

Of course, he also knows why.

Flesh Problems!

This era is full of endless ultimate particles, and the physical body of any creature is terrifying, beating the powerhouses of his time of the same level.

In his time, it was impossible for him to raise the ultimate body to this point, not because he didn't have enough understanding, but because he didn't have a reference at all, and he didn't have this heaven and earth condition!

This is a problem of the times, not a question of qualifications.

The natural disaster Jinpeng fell, and a king-level appeared, and the aura of each king-level was very terrifying, and they all beat the top king-level like Crane Shadow.

This is the essence of the Golden God Ministry, and the younger generation can beat the second strongest person in the Eagle Ministry.

Another time passed.

Suddenly.

Bang!!!!!

The formation of the Ten Realms Fox Mountain opened, and the entrance to a ruin emerged.

"It's time to go in!"

A king-level flew in, and occasionally a few generals entered, but no one stopped them.

And Ye Tian followed Crane Shadow and another elder and flew into this ruin.

......

Inside the ancient demon-level ruins.

This place is like another ultimate world, the interior is incomparably huge, but the suppression of heaven and earth is also greater.

Soon, they came to a huge number of stone monuments, which numbered one hundred and eight.

"Ancient Demon Monument!"

Ye Tian recognized it, and the patriarch had introduced these ancient demon tablets to him, which was one of the benefits of the ruins, and it was also one of the assessments.

For ordinary people, there is no way to pass the first level at all, and it is a very good opportunity to be able to improve the ultimate rules with the help of these ancient magic tablets.

Similarly, Tsurukage's goal was only to comprehend these ancient demon tablets, and he didn't think about passing the second level.

Ye Tian quickly chose an ancient demon monument and came here to comprehend.

These ancient demon tablets are all left by that ancient demon, and if you want to enter the second level, you must understand the ultimate mystery contained in this ancient demon tablet.

Of course, if you don't understand it thoroughly and don't care, just here to understand it will also help to improve the ultimate rule.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, silently contemplating, and time passed slowly.

In a blink of an eye, a period of time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had almost realized the mystery of this ancient magic monument.
